response.global_analysis:
1. JSON Match: Partially matched. The reference JSON included lyrics for 'Grateful Days' which were not performed in this specific segment, but the lyrics for 'Lupin the Fire' matched the audio. The spoken segment at the end had no reference, requiring 100% manual transcription and translation.
2. JSON Usage: Discarded the 'Grateful Days' lyrics since they were not sung. Utilized 'Lupin the Fire' lyrics for reference and manually transcribed the speech segment (03:15 to 05:00).
3. Timing & Pacing: Timed carefully around fast-paced lyrics, and precisely segmented the talking parts to align with the visual and audio gags of the screen shrinking. Corrected phonetic ambiguities like 'chijimatteru' (shrinking) and 'tatega' (vertical aspect ratio).

subtitles.original: 僕にとっての女王様
subtitles.english: For me, you are my queen

subtitles.original: そんなあなたを今夜抱きしめる
subtitles.english: Tonight, I'll embrace you

subtitles.original: 熱い唇をいただく
subtitles.english: And steal a kiss from your hot lips

subtitles.original: そして何よりも信じよう
subtitles.english: And above all, believe

subtitles.original: あなたの心狂おしい程
subtitles.english: Your heart, almost to madness

subtitles.original: It's a party night! Yeah!
subtitles.english: It's a party night! Yeah!

subtitles.original: Dancin' with us! Oh oh oh
subtitles.english: Dancin' with us! Oh oh oh

subtitles.original: Everybody don't stop dance! Let's go! Just do it!
subtitles.english: Everybody don't stop dance! Let's go! Just do it!

subtitles.english: Even if it's a thorny path

subtitles.original: 凍てつく夜だろうが
subtitles.english: Even if it's a freezing night

subtitles.original: 不可能が可能になるさ
subtitles.english: The impossible will become possible

subtitles.english: Just you and me

subtitles.original: ルパンザファイヤー
subtitles.english: Lupin the Fire!

subtitles.original: だからそうだから 誰にも手にしたことないお宝もらう
subtitles.english: That's right, so I will take the treasure that no one has ever laid hands on

subtitles.original: 狙った獲物は逃がさない
subtitles.english: I won't let the targeted prey escape

subtitles.original: それがなんだろうとお宝

subtitles.english: Calculating far ahead

subtitles.original: 瞬時にひらめく名案
subtitles.english: Instantly flashing a brilliant idea

subtitles.original: そしてあっと思ったらもう居ない
subtitles.english: And in the blink of an eye, I'm already gone

subtitles.original: もはや芸術ばりの盗みの美学
subtitles.english: The aesthetics of theft, which is almost an art form

subtitles.english: Put your hands up in the air!

subtitles.english: I steal your heart

subtitles.original: 絶対に逃がさん！
subtitles.english: I will absolutely not let you escape!

subtitles.original: 無駄な抵抗はやめて大人しく縄にかかれ、ルパン！逃がさんぞー！
subtitles.english: Give up your futile resistance and quietly surrender, Lupin! I won't let you get away!

subtitles.original: 世界で一人の最愛の
subtitles.english: To the only beloved one in the world

subtitles.original: 君自身に気持ち伝えたいよ
subtitles.english: I want to convey my feelings to you yourself

subtitles.original: 僕がほしいのは物じゃない

subtitles.original: あなたのハート
subtitles.english: Your heart

subtitles.original: 普段はとぼけた三枚目
subtitles.english: Usually a goofy comedian

subtitles.original: やるときゃ誰より真剣で
subtitles.english: But when I act, I'm more serious than anyone

subtitles.original: 頼りになるぜいざという時
subtitles.english: Reliable when the time comes

subtitles.original: こうなりたい誰が見ても素敵
subtitles.english: Want to be like this, wonderful in anyone's eyes

subtitles.original: 知性備えたスーパーマン
subtitles.english: A superman endowed with intellect

subtitles.original: 横にはお決まりスーパーウーマン
subtitles.english: Next to him, the usual superwoman

subtitles.original: 残り二小節ラストスパート
subtitles.english: Two bars left, the last spurt

subtitles.original: 憧れの男 Lupin The Third. Yeah!
subtitles.english: The man of admiration, Lupin the Third. Yeah!

subtitles.original: 獲物は確かにいただいたぜ
subtitles.english: I've definitely taken the prey

subtitles.original: はい！ということで、グレートフルデイズとルパンザファイヤー、2曲続けて聴いていただきました！
subtitles.english: Yes! So, you just heard "Grateful Days" and "Lupin the Fire", two songs in a row!

subtitles.original: グレートフルデイズはですね、えーっと、男性2人と女性1人の曲なんですけど、女性のところはね、絶対あずちゃんが良いということで、あずちゃん。で、ラップパートはもう、ノエルちゃんの顔しか浮かばなかったので、
subtitles.english: "Grateful Days" is a song for two men and one woman. For the female part, I absolutely wanted Azu-chan, so I got Azu-chan. And for the rap part, only Noel-chan's face came to mind...

subtitles.original: ノエルちゃんにお願いしました。二人とも、ありがとう！
subtitles.english: ...so I asked Noel-chan. Thank you to both of you!

subtitles.original: でね、ルパンの映像が流れてみんなびっくりしたんじゃない？ころねもびっくりした。
subtitles.english: And the Lupin video played, weren't you all surprised? Korone was surprised too.

subtitles.original: で、今日のハッシュタグは、もうね、7周年だって。凄いよね。この上のハッシュタグ「#戌神ころね7周年」で、ぜひいっぱい呟いてください。スクショも大丈夫だよ。
subtitles.english: And today's hashtag, yes, it's the 7th anniversary. Amazing, isn't it? Please tweet a lot using the hashtag above, "#InugamiKorone7thAnniversary". Screenshots are totally fine too.

subtitles.original: ね、ここのステージ、なんか今日は違った感じだけど、ここはどこなんでしょうか。どこ？
subtitles.english: Hey, this stage looks a bit different today, but where are we? Where?

subtitles.original: イヌバレー！
subtitles.english: Inu Valley!

subtitles.original: 素敵。今日はイヌバレーから、えー、すべてお送りしますので、よろしくお願いします。
subtitles.english: Lovely. Today, we'll be bringing you everything from Inu Valley, so please look forward to it.

subtitles.original: って思ったらさ、なんか画面小さくない？って思ったよね、リスナーさんもね。ころねもちょっと思ったので、
subtitles.english: Wait, is it just me, or is the screen a bit small? You guys thought so too, right? Korone also thought so, so...

subtitles.original: ちょっとね、あ、ちょっと待って！なんか、縮まってる！縮まってる！やめて！やめて！やばい！やばい！縦画になっちゃうよ、これ。
subtitles.english: ...I'll... Ah, wait! Wait! The screen borders are shrinking! They are shrinking! Stop! Stop! Oh no! Oh no! It's going to turn into a vertical video!

subtitles.original: ちょっと押して、今は令和なのでね、画面を広く使いたいので、あっち行け。もうちょっとあっち行け。もうちょっと。
subtitles.english: Let me push it back. Since we are in the Reiwa era, I want to use a widescreen. Go away! Go away a bit more! A bit more!

subtitles.original: もうちょっと。おっけ、おっけ、おっけ。こっちは？あっち行け！
subtitles.english: A bit more. Okay, okay, okay. What about this side? Go away!

subtitles.original: あ、そんなにころねと居たいの？おいで。ふふ、本当に来るんじゃねえよ！本当に来んじゃねえよ！
subtitles.english: Oh, do you want to be with Korone that much? Come here then. Hehe, don't actually come! Don't actually come here!
